evals.prompt: Troubleshoot this bug: Users report that when they refresh the page (F5), their dark mode theme preference is lost, even though we save it to localStorage in a useEffect inside the App layout.
evals.expected_output: Systematic debugging proposal identifying reproduction conditions, finding the root cause (such as Zustand persistence mismatch or hydration sync issue), and verifying the fix.
expectations: The response suggests reproducing the issue and isolating if it's in the UI render layer or Zustand state layer.
The response identifies the hydration timing or Zustand persistence mismatch as a likely root cause.
The response cautions against blind patching (e.g. adding manual delays/timeouts).
The response proposes a verification step to test the fix (e.g. mock refresh or test state persistence).
